_comment_purpose: Per-repo MCP configuration for Claude Code. Auto-loaded when Claude Code opens this repo. See Holly_Migration_Plan_v6000.md §8.
_comment_mechanism: Uses the LOCAL stdio Supabase MCP server (@supabase/mcp-server-supabase) authenticated with a Personal Access Token, NOT the hosted OAuth connector at mcp.supabase.com. This deliberately avoids the Claude.ai Connectors OAuth flow, which is account-global and whose re-authorization for a different organization can replace (and break) an existing connection to another org (e.g. Chestnut Studio).
_comment_secret: SUPABASE_PAT must be set as a project-level environment variable in the Claude Code web UI (Settings -> Project -> Environment Variables) OR exported in the shell for CLI use. NEVER commit the PAT itself.
_comment_scoping: --project-ref pins each entry to a single Supabase project. The PAT is account-wide (covers every org the user belongs to, including a separate Holly org), but --project-ref enforces the boundary at the MCP layer so a Holly session cannot touch the Studio project.
_comment_readwrite: Two entries. Day-to-day work uses the --read-only entry. Migrations and Edge Function deploys use the write entry (no --read-only flag). Ask before invoking the write entry.
